headline: Luxury Pool Design and Build Preparation Checklist — Santa Monica
articleBody:
Luxury Pool Design and Build Preparation Checklist for Santa Monica Clients

Before your Luxury Pool Design and Build appointment with Opus Builders, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Measurements
2. Budget
3. Design preferences
4. Permits needed
5. Material selections

Contact Opus Builders at (818) 939-8855 to get started.
